_patch_meta.description: Pre-analysis corrections for registry 062 (fellowship): (1) delete_flagged consistency fix on deleted term H2269; (2) soft-delete of SEMANTIC_RANGE_BREADTH phase2_flag on G2842, rejected on verse evidence. V4 — filename updated to new convention wa-{nnn}-{word}-patch-{type}-v{n}-{YYYYMMDD}.json.

operations.description: H2269 (cha.var) — mti_terms.status is 'delete' but delete_flagged was 0 on wa_term_inventory. Setting delete_flagged=1 for cross-table consistency. Section B3 correction.

set.obsolete_reason: Inner-being verse corpus (17 active records) does not support 4+ distinct semantic domains. Active verse set concentrates in two territories: divine-human correspondence and relational disposition. Bulk-patch flag rejected on verse evidence in Session B Stage 1 Step 1.3a.

operations.description: G2842 (koinōnia) — SEMANTIC_RANGE_BREADTH flag (term_inv_id=911, flag_id=16, source=bulk_patch). Assessed against 17 active verse records. Rejected: inner-being corpus does not confirm 4+ distinct semantic domains. Soft-deleting via composite PK per schema v3.9.0.

_patch_summary.hard_gate_b_target_status: CONFIRMED — 0 open B-target flags (no B-target flags existed for this registry)
